headline: Seagate Mozaic 4 Plus HAMR Rollout Tests AI Storage Growth Story
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings has begun production scale deployment of its Mozaic 4+ HAMR-based hard drives with two hyperscale cloud providers. The Mozaic 4+ platform is being used in live data centers to support drive capacities up to 44TB. The rollout marks a shift from lab and qualification phases to active use in large AI focused storage environments. For investors watching NasdaqGS:STX, this move comes with the stock at $375.01 and a very large 1 year return paired with a similarly very...

headline: Jim Cramer Warns Of 'Sloppy' US Open As South Korea's KOSPI Crashes 12%
summary: Jim Cramer flagged risk of a sloppy U.S. open Wednesday as South Korea's KOSPI crashed 12%, with memory-stock traders reportedly selling U.S. equities to raise cash. Futures, however, pointed higher.
